Sleek, light, and secure by default, Surface Laptop for Business devices are engineered with Microsoft innovation to power productive work at scale.

Designed for lasting performance

Purpose-built to support efficient work across roles and workflows.

Slide %{start} of %{total}. %{slideTitle}
Skip An sneak peek carousel showing five elements of a new era of work

Power that keeps up

Choose an Intel® or Snapdragon® processor with a built-in NPU for fast, complex multitasking.

Sharp, vibrant visuals

Vivid, anti-reflective 1 PixelSense™ 2 displays in 13-inch, 3 13.8-inch, and 15-inch sizes. 4

Built with sustainability in mind

64% of the enclosure on select devices is made with recycled content. 5 Modular components, 6 including removable SSDs, 7 allow for easy repair and help extend device use.

Higher-quality meetings

AI-optimized 1080p Surface Studio Cameras 8 and dual Studio Mics 9 improve calls everywhere.

More natural, accessible input

Full-size comfortable keyboards and large customizable haptic touchpads support all types of work styles.

End of An sneak peek carousel showing five elements of a new era of work section

Security built in from chip to cloud

Safeguard your people and data with the most advanced Windows security stack across hardware, software, firmware, and cloud.

Learn more

  • Reduce exposure with Zero Trust principles that verify access and enforce least privilege.

  • Block advanced attacks by default with Secured-core PCs built on Windows 11 Pro and Microsoft Pluton.

  • Remotely configure Surface UEFI settings via Microsoft Intune using DFCI. 25

  • Protect credentials and streamline recovery with Pluton, BitLocker, Windows Hello, and secure authentication options.

Move work forward faster with AI

Built-in NPUs and powerful AI tools help teams stay productive from first task to last.

Learn more

Recall in an instant

Quickly find past activity with Recall, 10 Copilot Chat, and improved Windows Search. 11

Access Copilot as work happens

Effortlessly interact with Copilot via keyboard, touch, or voice 12 to keep workflows uninterrupted.

Get more done in Microsoft 365

Improve productivity and get real-time assistance with Copilot in the Microsoft 365 suite. 13

Customize AI for your business

Create custom agents and workflows with Windows AI Foundry, Copilot Studio, and Copilot Agents. 14

Recall in an instant

Access Copilot as work happens

Get more done in Microsoft 365

Customize AI for your business

Organizations maximizing impact with Surface

Hear how leading businesses are improving security, productivity, and employee experiences with Surface Laptop.

“The simplicity that you get from Surface while maintaining the posture you’d expect from a premium product is the answer we were looking for.”

Cameron Chojnacki
Director of Technical Solutions and Information Security, Dynacare

Read customer story

“In our head office, Copilot+ PCs with Microsoft Surface enable better collaboration, helping our teams to work smarter and drive the business forward.”

Rob Barnes
Chief Information Officer, ASDA

Read customer story

Simplified, modern management

From deployment to diagnostics, Surface can help IT professionals reduce overhead, streamline support, and keep devices productive at scale.

Zero-touch lifecycle provisioning

Set up devices in minutes with Windows Autopilot while streamlining redeployment and recovery with removable SSD options. 7

Learn more

Extended device protection

Protect your investment, extend device use, and avoid surprise costs with Microsoft Protection Plans.

Learn more

Proactive fleet insights

Improve planning and support with proactive fleet insights from Surface Management Portal, 15 along with hands‑on remediation through Surface IT Toolkit.

Learn more

Meet the next generation of AI PCs

Our new laptops feature lightweight designs that balance performance, mobility, and all-day battery life 16 for work that doesn’t slow down. Click on the + icon below to explore Tech Specs.

Reliable enterprise performance with on-device AI

Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel

Compare

Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel

  • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) with 50 TOPS NPU
  • 16GB, 32GB or 64GB LPDDR5x RAM
  • Fast charging 18
  • 13.8-inch or 15-inch 4 PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
  • Customizable haptic touchpad and integrated privacy screen on select models 19

Compare

Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel

  • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) with 50 TOPS NPU
  • 16GB and 24GB LPDDR5x RAM
  • Fast charging 17
  • 13-inch 3 PixelSense™ touchscreen
  • Full x86 Windows app support

Power through workdays

Run AI, meetings, and multiple tasks all at once with smooth performance, powered by a built-in 50 TOPS NPU.

Move through tasks with ease

Keep workflows fast and friction-free with Copilot and Microsoft 365 13 AI experiences.

Stay connected, seamlessly

Maintain reliable connectivity across offices, homes, and hybrid environments with Wi-Fi 7 20 and Bluetooth® Core 5.4.

Protect data at every layer

Secure devices from chip to cloud with Secured-core PC architecture, Windows 11 Pro, and Microsoft Pluton security.

Choose the Surface Laptop for Business with the power, portability, and AI capabilities your organization needs.

Interested in Surface Pro for Business?

Laptop-level performance with full AI power in a slim, flexible tablet.

Explore 2-in-1 PCs

Frequently asked questions

|

  • Surface Laptop for Business devices deliver powerful performance and built-in AI to help your organization work smarter. With next-generation processors, enterprise-grade security, and easy manageability, each device is designed for modern workplaces that demand speed, flexibility, and reliability.

  • All Surface Laptop for Business devices are Copilot+ PCs, equipped with built in AI that can help employees work more efficiently—whether they’re finding information, creating content, or automating routine tasks. Dedicated AI hardware accelerates demanding workloads, while tools like Copilot Studio enable IT teams to build custom AI agents 14 that can streamline business processes.

  • Surface Laptop devices offer fast performance, expanded RAM and storage options, 22 and all-day battery life. 16 Select models support optional 5G, 21 Wi-Fi 7, 20 Bluetooth® 5.4, and docking for up to three 4K displays, 23 enabling teams to stay connected and productive anywhere.

  • Yes. All models are Secured-core PCs running Windows 11 Pro, with Microsoft Pluton security enabled by default. Additional protections include BitLocker encryption, Windows Hello, and optional privacy screens on select devices. 19 IT teams can manage firmware settings remotely through Microsoft Intune and DFCI for added control. 25

  • Absolutely. All laptops support zero-touch deployment, remote management with Microsoft Intune, 24 and firmware-level policy control. Devices may include removable SSDs 7 and replaceable components 6 to make repairs easier and maximize the use of your fleet.

  • Choose from 13-inch, 3 13.8-inch, or 15-inch models. 4 Select models feature a thin, light chassis made from 100% recycled aluminum alloy in the enclosure and 100% rare earth metals in the magnets. 5

  • The new Surface Laptop for Business lineup introduces two distinct options: the Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch and Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch. The Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch delivers strong workday performance in 13.8-inch and 15-inch designs, 4 powered by the latest Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3). The Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch offers a next-gen Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)-powered experience in a sleek, portable 13-inch form factor. 3

  • You can purchase Surface laptops from one of our approved partners. Learn more.

  • Surface Laptop Copilot+ PC models with built-in 40+ TOPS NPUs are designed for AI-first productivity. They support features like Cocreator and Windows Studio Effects, 26 making them ideal for teams using AI to collaborate and simplify workflows.

  • The new 5G-enabled Surface Laptop 13.8-inch with Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2) provides support for faster, more reliable connectivity for mobile professionals. 21 It’s especially useful for AI-powered tasks that rely on cloud access, video calls, and real-time collaboration.

  • Copilot+ PCs include built-in 40+ TOPS NPUs that can process AI workloads locally on the device. While traditional models focus more on compatibility and manageability, Copilot+ PCs also support enterprise-grade security and IT tools like Autopilot and Microsoft Intune. 24

  • Yes, every model meets Microsoft’s Secured-core PC standards and includes chip-to-cloud protection to help keep your data safe.

  • Surface Laptop for Business models offer 13-inch, 13.8-inch, and 15-inch screen sizes.

  • Surface Laptop Studio 2 boasts a 14.4-inch PixelSense™ display. Newer Surface Laptop models are available in 13-inch, 13.8-inch, and 15-inch sizes and offer updated hardware options, including next-generation processors like Snapdragon® and Intel® Core™.

  • Surface Laptop 4 is a legacy model that originally shipped with Windows 10. Newer Surface Laptop models are Copilot+ PCs that run Windows 11 Pro and offer updated hardware, improved performance, next-generation processors like Snapdragon® and Intel® Core™, and support for AI-integrated features.

  • Surface Laptop 5 is a legacy model that relies on a traditional central processing unit (CPU) and lacks a neural processing unit (NPU). Newer Surface Laptop models introduce next-generation processor options like Snapdragon® and Intel® Core™, an NPU, and integrated AI features like Copilot to support advanced workflows.
  • Where to buy
  • Surface blog
  • Power cord recall
  • [1] The Surface Laptop for Business display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
  • [2] Optimized for touch interaction only. Pen input and compatibility with Surface Pen, Surface Slim Pen, or similar accessories is not supported.
  • [3] Surface Laptop display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [4] Surface display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13.8-inch or 15-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [5] Enclosure includes A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, dated June, 2024.
  • [6] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Unless required by law, device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans.
  • [7] Drive Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the Drive is marketed as removable in the technical specifications. Devices returned without a drive may incur a replacement fee unless covered by a Drive Retention benefit (sold separately). Available plans and options may vary by device and region. See Surface Warranty, Protection Plans & Support – Microsoft Surface for Business for details.
  • [8] Copilot+ PCs feature; available effects vary by device.
  • [9] Voice focus requires activation, requires Windows 11 and is available in apps which use integrated device microphones and use certain Windows audio processing modes.
  • [10] Recall requires Windows Hello Enhanced Sign-in Security. Optimized for select languages [English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish]. Content-based and storage limitations apply.
  • [11] Improved Windows search works with specific text, image, and document formats only; optimized for select languages [English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish].
  • [12] Microsoft 365 Copilot license required. Supports multiple languages; some features only available in English. See what’s new in Voice Access.
  • [13] Requires eligible Microsoft 365 license. File upload and image generation limits apply.
  • [14] Requires Microsoft 365 along with tenant and per user licensing.
  • [15] Surface Management Portal is available to customers who use Microsoft Intune Admin Center and enroll at least one Surface device through Microsoft Intune.
  • [16] Battery life varies significantly by configuration and with settings, usage, and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance.
  • [17] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface 45W USB-C Wall Charger. Fast charging is supported with minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher (sold separately). Testing conducted by Microsoft in February 2026. For details on fast charging see - USB-C® and Fast Charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [18] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface Power Supply. Fast charging is supported with minimum 65W Surface Power Supply or minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher, sold separately. Testing conducted by Microsoft in February 2026. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and fast charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [19] Available on select 13.8-inch models at additional cost.
  • [20] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [21] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing. Optional 5G available on Surface Laptop, 13.8-inch Intel® configurations.
  • [22] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. Surface.com/Storage more details.
  • [23] External monitor support requires compatible displays, cables, and accessories. See Surface tested peripherals page for compatibility information.
  • [24] Microsoft Intune and Azure Active Directory required: sold separately.
  • [25] Requires Microsoft Intune and Windows Autopilot; available on eligible Autopilot-deployed Surface devices. Supported DFCI settings vary by device.
  • [26] Copilot+ PC experiences vary by device and market and may require updates continuing to roll out through 2025; timing varies.
